alt: Benny holding a bouquet in the middle of a green lawn.
title: Morning Light
caption: 草地人像保留了完整景深與空氣感，適合作為畫面節奏的開場。

alt: Benny and Cindy embracing in a meadow.
title: Quiet Embrace
caption: 主體集中、背景乾淨，搭配微微上提的卡片位移，讓情感更靠近觀者。

alt: Cindy sitting on the grass with a bouquet.
title: Soft Smile
caption: 近景笑容與柔和白紗細節很適合在中段帶出溫度，不需要額外華麗效果。

alt: Benny and Cindy lying on the lawn with a white dog.
title: Playful Pause
caption: 這張有自然互動與輕鬆感，所以保留點擊放大即可，避免過度包裝。

alt: A wide shot of Benny and Cindy walking together on a hill.
title: Open Horizon
caption: 遠景留白很珍貴，除了 Hero 以外也保留在相簿中，讓整體呼吸感更完整。

alt: Formal studio portrait of Benny and Cindy.
title: Classic Portrait
caption: 棚拍畫面乾淨俐落，適合放在戶外場景之後，平衡整體視覺層次。

alt: Benny and Cindy smiling at each other in a studio portrait.
title: Looking Back
caption: 這組棚拍的情緒偏親密，因此用較輕的卡片角度維持優雅，而不是做強烈進場。

alt: Full-length studio portrait with a long bridal train.
title: Long Train
caption: 長裙襬本身就很有份量，版面安排留足空白，讓線條自然延伸。

alt: Benny and Cindy smiling brightly in formal wear.
title: Bright Laughter
caption: 笑容張力比較高，所以動畫只留淡入與微位移，不再加多餘層次。

alt: An intimate close-up of Benny hugging Cindy from behind.
title: Close To You
caption: 近距離畫面最適合搭配 lightbox，放大後能更完整感受到花束與表情細節。

alt: A playful close-up studio shot with both reaching toward the camera.
title: Framed By Us
caption: 這張有鏡頭互動感，放在相簿尾端能留下比較輕盈的收束。
